name: Course / Tutorial
noteContentFormat:
# `= this.file.name`

## AI Summary

{{"Summarize this course in 2-3 sentences. Focus on: what you'll learn, who it's for, and the teaching approach (hands-on, video lectures, etc)."|blockquote}}

---

![Course Image]({{image}})

## Course Info

| | |
|---|---|
| **Instructor** | `= this.instructor` |
| **Price** | `= this.price` |
| **Rating** | `= this.rating` |
| **Duration** | `= this.duration` |

## Why I Want to Take This



## Description

{{description}}

## Key Topics

{{"List the 5-8 main topics or modules covered in this course as a bulleted list. Be specific about what skills or concepts are taught."}}

---

🎓 [Enroll](`= this.source`)

properties.name: instructor
properties.value: {{"Who is the instructor or creator of this course? Return just their name(s), nothing else."}}

properties.name: price
properties.value: {{"What is the price of this course? Return just the price with currency symbol (e.g. '$99', 'Free', '$29/month'). If multiple tiers, show range like '$99-$149'."}}

properties.name: rating
properties.value: {{"What is the rating of this course? Return in format like '4.7/5' or '4.7 stars'. If no rating shown, return empty."}}

properties.name: duration
properties.value: {{"What is the duration or length of this course? Return concisely like '12 hours', '8 weeks', '50 lessons', or '218-page book + videos'."}}

properties.name: platform
properties.value: {{"What platform is this course on? Return just the platform name like 'Udemy', 'Coursera', 'Self-hosted', etc."}}

properties.name: skill_level
properties.value: {{"What skill level is this course for? Return one of: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, All Levels. If not specified, return 'Not specified'."}}

properties.name: ai_summary
properties.value: {{"In 15 words or less, what will you learn from this course?"}}

properties.name: topics
properties.value: {{"List 2-4 topic tags for this course as comma-separated values (e.g. design, UI, CSS, developer-tools). No hashtags."}}
